calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 cue-authority lineage CLEAN EVIDENCE retest: re-run the 640a scaffold cue-recall gain sweep (cue_recall_gain{0.2,1.0,5.0} x kappa{2.0,10.0} + ARM_OFF, 3 seeds) now that modulatory-bias-selection-authority is VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-643a PASS). use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 on every arm so the cue->z_goal->MECH-295 approach bias has bounded authority over the E3.select argmin in the contact-making scaffold P2 env. Promotes 640a (diagnostic, flat lift, authority OFF) to EVIDENCE.
items.note: EVIDENCE (claim_ids=[SD-057,MECH-346,MECH-347], all v3_pending; serial L6 cue-recall -> L4 token-pointer seed -> SD-057 bank chain co-tagged because the post-cue approach lift cannot be attributed to one link). Acceptance: PRIMARY C_LIFT_PRIMARY = post_cue_approach_lift>0 over within-run background on >=2/3 seeds in the pre-registered decisive cell ARM_CUE_g5_k10 (maximal cue_pull); GUARDS C1 cue fires + C2 trace captured (no-trace -> non_contributory instrumentation FAIL, route /diagnose-errors, NOT evidence-against). overall=C1 AND C2 AND C_LIFT_PRIMARY. evidence_direction: supports / weakens / non_contributory per the gate. Secondary (reported, not verdict-driving, multiple-comparison caveat): C_LIFT_ANY across 6 cells + gain-monotonicity. The single change vs 640a is use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 (validated V3-EXQ-643a PASS 2026-06-06 after the float32 catastrophic-cancellation fix); NO SD-056 online training in this harness so scores stay bounded and no rollout-norm clamp is needed. Smoke --dry-run PASS end-to-end 2026-06-07 (7 arms, cue fires 30-60/run, z_goal forms ~0.42-0.46, acceptance machinery exercised). seeds=3 x conditions=7 -> 21 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=235 (stage0 20+stage0b 10+P0 120+P1 70+P2 15).

items.title: Post-603i E2 escape-affordance LINKER readiness microdiagnostic. Forced-choice 4-action probe (no-op/harm-worsening/escape/neutral) driving E2EscapeAffordanceLinker (ree_core/pfc/e2_escape_affordance_linker.py) DIRECTLY with controlled E2 consequence proxies + known outcomes; 4 arms x 3 seeds; readiness gates G0-G8. Validates ONLY that the post-603i linker/readout can learn a controlled 'where out is' signal and expose bounded threat-gated E3 bias. NOT the full 603 behavioural bridge validation; NO ecological survival claim.
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC, claim_ids=[] (does NOT weight claim confidence). Lineage: originated V3-EXQ-603i (route substrate_not_ready_requeue, evidence_direction=non_contributory, NO claim weakening); references the V3-EXQ-603 SD-054/hazard-survival/relief-safety escape-affordance bridge lineage but is a DIFFERENT experiment from the full 603 behavioural bridge validation. New number (NOT 603j) because it probes a NEW substrate module (the E2EscapeAffordanceLinker, distinct from the SD-059 arithmetic bridge 603i tested) and asks a different question; the substrate plan doc (docs/substrate_plans/post_603i_e2_escape_affordance_linkage.md) explicitly says 'Do not queue a full 603j bridge re-run from this scaffold'. Arms: ARM_DISABLED_CONTROL / ARM_LINKER_READOUT_ONLY / ARM_LINKER_E3_BIAS / ARM_LINKER_TO_RELIEF_SAFETY. Gates: G0 disabled bit-stable (3/3); G1 escape readout learns [load-bearing] (>=2/3); G2 no-op uncredited (>=2/3); G3 harm-worsening not preferred escape (>=2/3); G4 threat-gated bias points to escape [load-bearing] (>=2/3); G5 bias zero when safe (3/3); G6 sim/hypothesis blocks learning (3/3); G7 weights persist across reset (>=2/3); G8 inputs detached (3/3); G_RS linker features feed trainable relief/safety learner (secondary, >=2/3). Diagnostic adjudication: readiness precondition linker_optimizer_stepped (matched to the load-bearing G1 exercise) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor, NEVER a substrate verdict. Does NOT validate or weaken SD-059/MECH-358 or MECH-302/303/304; PASS is NOT V3 closure; FAIL is NOT bridge falsification. Route after PASS: /queue-experiment a 603-lineage FULL behavioural bridge re-test with linker features attached to the trainable relief/safety heads. Route after FAIL: /failure-autopsy on THIS readiness diagnostic (localise to readout learning/E2 geometry/E3 bias/no-op exclusion/sim boundary/reuse-E2 assumption); do NOT rerun 603i. Validated: validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (0 readiness-warnings, 0 arm-fingerprint-backlog); --dry-run PASS end-to-end; full-budget 3-seed gate check all gates 3/3 (label=linker_readout_ready). seeds=3 x conditions=4 -> 12 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=60 (forced-choice rounds per cell).
